user.title: Add P2000 monitor
user.description: Create a monitor profile. Add the integration again for each additional profile. Separate cities, priorities and keywords with commas; choose services using checkboxes. The last feed alert sensor is disabled by default to avoid duplicate entities.

error.invalid_url: Enter one or more valid http(s) URLs.

init.title: Edit monitor profile
init.description: Edit this monitor profile. Choose one or more services using the checkboxes. Enable the feed sensor only when you need it for this profile.
